statement: In every magma, Equation 1926 (`x = (y * (y * x)) * (y * z)`) implies Equation 4499 (`x * (y * y) = (z * z) * z`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0590
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op y (op y x)) (op y z))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, (op x (op y y)) = (op (op z z) z)
